note: A partial, sourced snapshot of Indiana local data-center restrictions. Indiana University's Environmental Resilience Institute counts ~11 counties with ordinances and 17+ with temporary moratoriums as of mid-2026; the named jurisdictions below are those with confirmed public sources. Restriction status changes often — verify locally.

sources.label: WFYI: nearly a third of Indiana counties restrict data centers

counties.name: Marshall
counties.detail: Enacted Indiana's first permanent county data-center ban (Apr 2026).
